title: John Toth
summary: The sole questioner of the February 2023 Q&A — 26 turns through free energy, Skinwalker Ranch, and the Historical Download protocol at full stretch.
markdown:
**John Toth** conducts the February 9, 2023 session — the record's great mid-era Q&A, and
the session where the [Historical Download](/lore/historical-download/) protocol fires
more often than anywhere else in the corpus. *"My name is John Toth,"* he begins, and for
26 turns the downloads follow, one after another: the ancestral connection to the
[Akashic record](/lore/akashic-record/), the claim that the Earth is *"an artificial
construct, created eons ago by the race known as [Elohim](/lore/elohim/)"*, the
[ley-line grid](/lore/ley-lines/) read as *"an artificial containing grid,"* and the
portal country around [Skinwalker Ranch](/lore/skinwalker-ranch/).

His session's session-page carries its own summary of the wider ground it covers —
[free energy](/lore/anti-gravity/), the era's religious questions, and the
[UBI-and-brain-chip](/lore/universal-basic-income/) future the record sketches for 2030s
governance. As a questioner, Toth's style is the steady list: topic after topic offered
up to the download protocol, making his session one of the densest single deposits of
doctrine in the archive.
